2159020.name: Under The Shack
2159020.description: Under The Shack is about a college girl on her way home from school. On her way home from school her car breaks down and she is left stranded waiting for a ride from her sister in the rain. She chooses to go inside a shack and that is where everything falls apart. Stumbling a cross an old mostly abandoned facility she uncovers a corrupt company that was suppose to be dissolved long ago. Now she is forced to try to escape before her sister shows up and leaves. At the moment the game is rather short but much larger story and game will be releasing get in now while its still only 1$
2159020.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
